title: Compromised Package: event-stream
detail: event-stream@3.3.6 is a known compromised package. In 2018, a malicious dependency (flatmap-stream) was added that stole cryptocurrency wallet keys.
remediation: Remove event-stream immediately and audit your codebase for any impact

title: Possible Typosquatting: lodsah
detail: lodsah is suspiciously similar to popular package 'lodash' (Levenshtein distance: 2). This could be a typosquatting attack.
remediation: Verify the package name. Did you mean 'lodash'?

title: Suspicious Install Script
detail: postinstall script contains 'curl' command — possible data exfiltration or malware download
remediation: Review the postinstall script contents and remove if not needed
